page.title: Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Government agencies disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Government agencies disestablished in YYYY"}}, where "YYYY" is a 4-digit decade.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|Politics|{{FindYDCportal | {{Title year}} }}}}This category is for '''[[government agency|government agencies]]''' disestablished in the '''year [[{{Title year}} ]]'''{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Category see also if exists 2|Government agencies established in {{Title year}}|Government agencies established in the {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|Government agencies established in {{Century name from title year}}}} {{Category see also if exists 2|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{Title year}}|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{Century name from title year}}}} [[Category:Government agencies by year of disestablishment|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:Government agencies disestablished in the {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|{{Title year}}]] {{#ifexist:Category:Political organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}|[[Category:Political organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}]]| [[Category:Organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title year}} >= 1500|[[Category:{{Title year}} in politics|/Government agencies]]}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Government agencies disestablished in YYYY"}}, where "YYYY" is a 4-digit decade.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}} {{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Government agencies disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Government agencies disestablished in YYYY"}}, where "YYYY" is a 4-digit decade.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|Politics|{{FindYDCportal | {{Title year}} }}}}This category is for '''[[government agency|government agencies]]''' disestablished in the '''year [[{{Title year}} ]]'''{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Category see also if exists 2|Government agencies established in {{Title year}}|Government agencies established in the {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|Government agencies established in {{Century name from title year}}}} {{Category see also if exists 2|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{Title year}}|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{Century name from title year}}}} [[Category:Government agencies by year of disestablishment|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:Government agencies disestablished in the {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|{{Title year}}]] {{#ifexist:Category:Political organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}|[[Category:Political organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}]]| [[Category:Organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title year}} >= 1500|[[Category:{{Title year}} in politics|/Government agencies]]}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Government agencies disestablished in YYYY"}}, where "YYYY" is a 4-digit decade.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}} {{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Government agencies disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Government agencies disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Government agencies disestablished in YYYY"}}, where "YYYY" is a 4-digit decade.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|Politics|{{FindYDCportal | {{Title year}} }}}}This category is for '''[[government agency|government agencies]]''' disestablished in the '''year [[{{Title year}} ]]'''{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Category see also if exists 2|Government agencies established in {{Title year}}|Government agencies established in the {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|Government agencies established in {{Century name from title year}}}} {{Category see also if exists 2|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{Title year}}|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|Courts and tribunals disestablished in {{Century name from title year}}}} [[Category:Government agencies by year of disestablishment|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:Government agencies disestablished in the {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|{{Title year}}]] {{#ifexist:Category:Political organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}|[[Category:Political organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}]]| [[Category:Organizations disestablished in {{Title year}}]] {{#ifexpr: {{Title year}} >= 1500|[[Category:{{Title year}} in politics|/Government agencies]]}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Government agencies disestablished in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Government agencies disestablished in YYYY"}}, where "YYYY" is a 4-digit decade.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}} {{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Government agencies disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Government_agencies_disestablished_in_year_category_header here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Government agencies disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
